name: John Lennon
title: John Lennon - taken 12/8/80 killed later that night by the other person in photo 12/8/80, 40
description: John Lennon - taken 12/8/80 killed later that night by the other person in photo 12/8/80, 40
bio: John Lennon was an English singer, songwriter, and peace activist who co-founded the Beatles. His solo career and activism for peace made him one of the most influential cultural figures of the 20th century.
